query:
WITH picked AS (
            SELECT id FROM relay_invocations
            WHERE granter_agent_id = $1
              AND status = 'pending'
            ORDER BY created_at ASC
            LIMIT $2
            FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
        )
        UPDATE relay_invocations i
        SET status = 'in_progress',
            claimed_at = now(),
            claimed_by_user_id = $3
        FROM picked
        WHERE i.id = picked.id
        RETURNING i.id
